Why Choose Amer Center Al Twar?

Located directly inside the Dubai Immigration building in DAFZA Al Twar, we provide the fastest, most reliable Golden Visa Dubai, Family Visa, Emirates ID, and All Visa Services in Dubai.

Inside Dubai Immigration

Direct access to immigration authorities for instant processing

WhatsApp-First Service

Apply from anywhere without visiting our office

8+ Years Experience

Trusted by 50,000+ satisfied customers

100% Approval Rate

We don't submit until your application is perfect
